name: Infernal Paradise University
description:
Credits to Retrospecter and his team for the mod and lore. The art was made by TiredPinkPanda.

Welp, this should be the last of the Retrospecter saga. The initial message should suffice but my brain juice was low so it's probably not written the best but it should work.

This has been done partially as a milestone, partially just because I wished to make this. May as well make myself busy in some way shape or form. Otherwise this has been done on hopes and dreams as the lore isn't accurate about with IPU is about, just a University/College.

And yes, I might make more initial messages like being in different scenarios and what not just to keep it interesting. Otherwise, I'm gone and won't make another bot for weeks, yippee.

Trigger Warning: Usage of Drugs (though the students have stopped using it, it could be mentioned.)
creator: Plagie
